description: System Refactor: Consolidate existing Python modules provisioning AI CLI coding agents into a modular sub-package and implement localized results directory and target-aware pathing.

prepare_ops_result_dir.input: Ensure the directory 'multi_agent_poc/workflow_results/sys_ops/' exists to act as a localized registry for system operations artifacts.

create_cli_package.input: Create directory multi_agent_poc/cli_coding_agents/ and an empty __init__.py to establish it as a Python package.

migrate_agent_wrappers.input: Move gemini_agent.py, mistral_vibe_agent.py, and amazon_q_agent.py into multi_agent_poc/cli_coding_agents/.

refactor_orchestrator_logic.input: Modify orchestrator.py: 1) Update _execute_*_task methods to resolve agent paths in cli_coding_agents/. 2) Refactor the main() 'custom' command logic to dynamically save results in workflow_results/<sub_folder>/ based on the JSON's parent directory.

validate_structural_integrity.input: Run the existing test suite in multi_agent_poc/tests/ to ensure that path refactoring has not broken core orchestration logic.

update_architecture_docs.input: Update multi_agent_poc/README.md to reflect the new modular structure and the use of 'sys_ops' localized result folders.
